items.title: SABRI Receives DPIIT Recognition
items.summary: SABRI Pvt. Ltd. has been officially recognized by the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT) as an innovative startup in the agricultural sector.

items.title: New Hi-Tech Polyhouse Operational
items.summary: Our state-of-the-art 320 sq.m Hi-Tech Polyhouse for exotic seed germination is now fully operational, enabling year-round production of premium vegetables.

items.title: Partnership with Major Retail Platforms
items.summary: SABRI expands its market reach through partnerships with leading platforms including Amazon Fresh, Zepto, BigBasket, and Flipkart Minutes.

items.title: Hydroponics Pilot Program Launched
items.summary: Launching our water-efficient hydroponics cultivation program for high-value exotic crops, reducing water usage by up to 70%.
